message.content:
@startuml
participant "Control" as Control
participant "Graph" as Graph
participant "nodes[i]:Node" as nodes
participant "ants[i]:Ant" as ants

Control -> Graph : getNodes()
Graph -> Control : nodes

loop [nodes]
    opt [nodes[i].getContent() instanceof FreeNode]
        Control -> ants[i]: getAnts()
        ants[i] -> Control : frms
        loop [fourmis]
            opt [ants[i] instanceof MovableAnt]
                ants[i] -> ants[i] : move()
        end
    end
end
@enduml
